title: Senior Data Architect / Expert
description: 10+ years of experience in designing and delivering large-scale, enterprise-grade data platforms supporting analytics, AI, and real-time use cases. Holds a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field. Combines deep technical expertise with strong leadership and client-facing capabilities to translate business needs into secure, scalable, and future-proof data architectures. Technical SkillsDesign of enterprise-scale data architectures supporting analytics, AI, and real-time data use cases.Strong expertise in distributed data processing and storage platforms for high-volume and high-velocity data.Advanced mastery of cloud-native data services across AWS, Azure, and GCP, including hybrid and multi-cloud setups.Proven experience building end-to-end data pipelines (with strong reliability and performance constraints.Solid background in data modeling, data integration, and data lifecycle management for structured and unstructured data.Strong command of data governance, security-by-design, and regulatory compliance, ensuring trusted and auditable data platforms.Experience preparing data platforms for advanced analytics, AI, and machine learning production workloads.Managerial & Client-Facing SkillsStrong managerial and leadership skills, with the ability to guide technical teams and drive architectural decisions.Excellent client-facing capabilities, including:Strong ability to translate business needs into scalable data architectures.Ability to clearly articulate complex technical concepts to non-technical and executive audiences.Confidence in leading architecture workshops, design authorities, and steering committees.Strong stakeholder management and communication skills in multi-disciplinary and multi-cultural environments.
